headline: Is Lamb Weston (LW) Starting To Look Interesting After A 32% One Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Lamb Weston Holdings at around US$39.35 is starting to look like value or still has more downside risk, you are not alone. The stock has recorded a 3.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 16.1% decline over the last 30 days and is down 32.1% over 1 year and 60.9% over 3 years, which raises questions about how much of the bad news might already be reflected in the price. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in the broader food and consumer staples...
